allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\SSI\\.claude\\projects\\D--Usuario-SSI-Escritorio-shiro-dashboard\\b7d6f771-67e0-46c0-8ff4-56f2cfd6daf9\\tool-results\\toolu_01NYyNP5zwCEeH6HaK2nzc9y.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; \($json[0].text | Select-String -Pattern 'data-name="Size=[^"]+"' -AllMatches\).Matches.Value | ForEach-Object { $_ -replace 'data-name="|"', '' } | Sort-Object -Unique | Measure-Object -Line | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Lines)
